name: Hisabi Debt Commitments
query: SELECT name AS "Debt:Link/Hisabi Debt:180", wallet_id AS "Wallet:Link/Hisabi Wallet:170", debt_name AS "Debt Name:Data:180", direction AS "Direction:Data:110", status AS "Status:Data:100", due_date AS "Due Date:Datetime:150", remaining_amount AS "Remaining Amount:Currency:130", currency AS "Currency:Data:90", counterparty_name AS "Counterparty:Data:150", confirmed AS "Confirmed:Check:90" FROM `tabHisabi Debt` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status IN ('active', 'pending') ORDER BY due_date ASC, modified DESC
